reasoning: Koren, we need to attack your poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. Your last ride indicates a need for more structured intensity. This session will simulate the demands of the Alpine Loop, specifically preparing you for the sustained climb to Sundance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 4 sets of Over-Unders: 5 mins at 218W, 2 mins at 242W, repeat. Focus on controlled breathing and efficient pedaling.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
